# mixpanel_event_drop_filter (Resource)

Manages a Mixpanel event drop filter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mixpanel_event_drop_filter" "drop_debug" {
  project_id = 1234567

  event_name = "debug_ping"
  active     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean)
- `event_name` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `project_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created` (String)
- `deleted` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `legacy` (Boolean)
